assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures opt.UserInteraction.LogoutUrl to a specific logout path
A logout page calls GetLogoutContextAsync(logoutId) to retrieve the logout context
The logout page calls HttpContext.SignOutAsync to end the authentication session
The logout page uses context.SignOutIFrameUrl for front-channel logout iframe rendering
assertions.rationale: The page sets SignOutIFrameUrl = context.SignOutIFrameUrl and renders it in an <iframe>.

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has BackChannelLogoutUri set to 'https://app.example.com/bff/backchannel'
